diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory class for handler composition with typed support
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for matched routes and path info
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with event listeners and context
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading, generating, setting cookies with options
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Safe summary: Creates test client from Hono app for testing
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment helper for different execution platforms
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper generating dynamic class names with styles on SSR client
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: (none)
+- Neighbor files: ./css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities for slug generation, minification, and class name helpers
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with header management and strict RFC compliance options
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for inspecting app routes and router name
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML rendering helper with escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG helper for static site generation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, defaultPlugin, ToSSGResult, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions
+- Reads as: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with route fetching and content saving
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for adding params and controlling SSG behavior
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Streaming helpers for real-time responses with SSE and text streaming
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Generic streaming API with TransformStream and error handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with message-based chunked output
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./
+- Safe summary: Text streaming helper with proper content-type header
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts
+- Neighbor files: ./accepts\
